=== horizontal_two
# Container horizontal split — two equal children side by side.
widget: container
horizontal: true
width: 24
height: 5
child: Left panel
child: Right panel
===
╔══════════════════════╗
║Left panel Right panel║
║                      ║
║                      ║
╚══════════════════════╝

=== horizontal_three
# Container horizontal split — three equal children.
widget: container
horizontal: true
width: 30
height: 5
child: One
child: Two
child: Three
===
╔════════════════════════════╗
║One       Two      Three    ║
║                            ║
║                            ║
╚════════════════════════════╝

=== vertical_two
# Container vertical split — two equal children stacked.
widget: container
horizontal: false
width: 22
height: 7
child: Top section
child: Bottom section
===
╔════════════════════╗
║Top section         ║
║                    ║
║                    ║
║Bottom section      ║
║                    ║
╚════════════════════╝

=== vertical_three
# Container vertical split — three equal children.
widget: container
horizontal: false
width: 22
height: 9
child: First
child: Second
child: Third
===
╔════════════════════╗
║First               ║
║                    ║
║                    ║
║Second              ║
║                    ║
║Third               ║
║                    ║
╚════════════════════╝
